topics.name: 100 - 200 Level: UNN Science Foundation & Core Programming
topics.description: COS 101, COS 102, CSC 201, MTH 101, PHY 101, and General Studies at UNN Nsukka.

subtopics.name: COS 101 & COS 102: Computing Fundamentals & Problem Solving (UNN)
objectives: Study computer architectures, algorithms, flowcharts, and Python programming at UNN

subtopics.name: CSC 201 & CSC 202: OOP with Java and Digital Logic Design
objectives: Master Java object-oriented programming, digital circuits, combinational logic, and assembly

topics.name: 300 - 400 Level: Advanced Computing, Software Engineering, SIWES, and UNN Project
topics.description: Data Structures, Database Management, Software Engineering, AI, and UNN Thesis.

subtopics.name: CSC 301 & CSC 302: Data Structures, DBMS, and SIWES Internship
objectives: Implement data structures, SQL database modeling, and complete 6-month industrial training

subtopics.name: CSC 401 & CSC 499: Artificial Intelligence, Compiler Construction, and Thesis
objectives: Implement neural networks, compiler parsing, and defend original B.Sc. research thesis at UNN
